description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk constructed primarily from wood or wood laminate, featuring a smooth, dark brown finish. The left side of the desk includes a set of two drawers with metallic handles, providing storage space for office supplies or documents. Above the drawers, there is a pull-out keyboard tray, which is slightly recessed beneath the main desktop surface. The right side of the desk is supported by a solid vertical panel, giving the structure stability and a clean, minimalist appearance. The back and sides of the desk are plain, with no additional features or openings. The overall design is functional and suitable for both professional and home office environments.
description: A modern, dark brown wooden desk with two drawers, a pull-out keyboard tray, and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with metallic handles and a pull-out keyboard tray beneath the desktop.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, flat side panel and the full length of the desktop surface.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain back panel with no visible features or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side of the drawers and the recessed keyboard tray area.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the drawers and keyboard tray, intended to be accessed from the front; the solid panel is at the right, and the plain back is opposite the user.
